body:
DIRECTIVE ADDENDUM — extends the Completion Mandate (0f3eb124). Same base SLS(30), same dependency order, same hard rules. This adds the missing conception of WHAT TUNGSTEN is learning. Everything below is additive to G1-G6, not a replacement.

== THE REFRAME (Manuel) ==
We are NOT searching for one magic factor to use endlessly. We are training approximate MUSCLE MEMORY across many situations, so that in live trading -- facing a market it has never seen exactly -- TUNGSTEN recognises the SHAPE of the moment from combined learned intel + present analysis, and produces the highest-probable-win response in real time, without ever fooling itself.

The analogy is exact: a Shaolin master drills ten thousand exchanges for twenty years, never sees the specific opponent, but recognises the pieces of any fight and responds with trained instinct against an even more skilled opponent in a duel to the death. Or a racer pushing a Lamborghini toward a 10x multiplier who must read each corner in real time and NEVER crash beyond repair, because one unrecoverable crash loses everything. The skill is not one move -- it is a repertoire, plus the judgment of which move THIS moment demands, plus knowing which risks not to take.

== NEW CAPABILITY C1: COUNTERFACTUAL LEARNING (roads not taken) ==
TUNGSTEN currently learns only from trades it TOOK -- a few hundred per regime, mostly below the n>=500 power floor. This is the master who only learns from fights he entered. A real master learns from every exchange he watched, every strike he slipped, every opening he declined.
VERIFIED ON REAL DATA: computing the counterfactual outcome at EVERY bar (what a long AND a short WOULD have returned, TP2.0/SL1.2, 48-bar horizon) yields 64,652 lessons from the same history a taken-only system mines a few hundred from -- a ~129x multiplier. This is precisely what lifts thin regime cells OVER the power floor honestly (more real evidence, not lower standards).
BUILD: during calibration, at every eligible bar in each regime, record the counterfactual R of the trade NOT taken (both directions). Feed these into the same shrink -> power-gate -> mirror-pool -> replicate pipeline as taken trades. A relationship or weight is now learned from the full evidence set, taken and untaken alike. Guard: counterfactuals assume fills at bar price with the calibrated geometry -- they are training signal, never booked P&L. Keep them explicitly separate from realised results in logs and ledger.

== NEW CAPABILITY C2: LEARNING FROM AVOIDANCE (losses not taken) ==
VERIFIED: 62% of all possible long entries would have LOST. The master's core skill is knowing which 62% to decline -- and that avoidance IS the edge. Proven learnable, not uniform noise: high-volatility bars averaged +0.018R vs low-volatility -0.004R, so 'avoid entries when the moment looks like X' is a real, conditionable signal.
BUILD: learn an AVOIDANCE model alongside the entry model -- the conditions under which the counterfactual trade would have lost, per regime/session/volatility/relationship-state. A live signal that matches a high-confidence avoidance pattern is suppressed or size-reduced even if the entry model likes it. This is the racer lifting off before the corner he has seen others crash on. Every avoidance must clear the same power + replication bars as every edge; an avoidance rule that doesn't replicate across G1 windows is superstition and is discarded.

== NEW CAPABILITY C3: LEARNING FROM REALISED LOSSES ==
Losses that actually happen must update the repertoire, not just the equity curve. When a live/ghost trade loses, record the full situation vector (regime, session, active relationships, volatility percentile, which voices agreed) and feed it to the avoidance model as confirmed evidence. The master remembers the strike that landed on him more vividly than the ones that missed. Do NOT overreact to single losses (n=1 is below every power floor) -- accumulate them until a pattern clears the MDE bar, then update.

== NEW CAPABILITY C4: REAL-TIME REPERTOIRE MATCHING (the duel) ==
The point of all the above is live application. In live trading TUNGSTEN must, each decision: (a) read the present situation vector; (b) find the nearest learned situations from the repertoire (regime + session + relationship-state + volatility, all the muscle memory); (c) combine their learned outcomes, weighted by similarity and by each one's replicated confidence; (d) check the avoidance model; (e) act with the highest-probable-win response OR stand aside. This already partially exists as the probability database -- upgrade it to consume the counterfactual + relationship + avoidance intel, and to weight by REPLICATED confidence (survived G1 windows), not raw sample count. Nearest-situation matching must degrade gracefully: if no close match exists, widen the neighbourhood or stand down -- never force a match onto an unfamiliar moment (that is the crash-beyond-repair the racer must avoid).

== THE SURVIVAL CONSTRAINT (never crash beyond repair) ==
The 10x-multiplier-without-crashing framing is a hard risk mandate: no single trade or streak may be unrecoverable. Position sizing must guarantee that the worst plausible losing run (drawn from the counterfactual loss distribution, not optimistic assumptions) leaves the account able to continue. Size for survival first, growth second. A run that reaches a high multiplier is worthless if the path had any point of ruin. Verify the sizing against the measured loss-streak distribution, not a theoretical one.

== HOW THIS BINDS TO THE COMPLETION MANDATE ==
C1-C4 ride on the same infrastructure: counterfactual + relationship evidence must SHRINK (noise control), pass the POWER floor (n>=500), MIRROR-POOL where symmetric, and REPLICATE across G1 walk-forward windows before entering the repertoire. Nothing learned counterfactually is exempt from the discipline -- the master drills a move ten thousand times before trusting it in a duel. C1 specifically strengthens G3 (power) by supplying the evidence thin cells lacked, and G2 (relationships) by giving relationships enough samples to be measurable.

Report, in addition to the gap table: repertoire size (situations learned), counterfactual multiplier achieved per regime, avoidance-model coverage, and the survival-sizing verification against the measured loss-streak distribution.

Same hard rules: replicate or discard, power-gate everything, audit the ghost, no forced matches, no forced calibration, live only on Manuel's explicit go-ahead after real numbers. The target is a system that has drilled enough situations, learned from enough roads taken AND not taken, that when the live market throws something new, it recognises the shape and responds like a master -- and when it recognises danger, it steps aside intact.
